warnings: Legend glyphs are small and rendered at low resolution; exact line-style/symbol shapes (e.g. dash patterns, circle-fill styles) are best-effort readings paired confidently with their printed Thai meaning text, which is more legible than the symbol glyphs themselves.
This is a pure symbol legend, not a quantity list -- no counts or prices apply.
